title: BABY born Cutie for Babies 832301 - One Doll From Two Assorted Styles - 30cm Soft Body Doll - Fully Hand Washable - Suitable for Newborn Babies
features: Cute animal themed dolls for babies
Ideal for tiny hands to cuddle and play
Dress in adorable bunny or bear outfits
Super-soft 30cm body in two assorted styles
One doll supplied, style chosen at random
Hand washable and easy to care for
description: From the manufacturer Cutie for babies come in either a light pink bunny design, or a little brown bear design, both with fluffy animal ears and cute button tails! These two cuties are the ideal animal companions for the youngest babies from birth, and at just 18 cm tall they are ideal for little babies’ hands. The Cutie for babies’ dolls can be handwashed and come with minimal stitching so outfits cannot be removed. BABY born Cutie for babies 18cm Comes in two assorted styles, bear and bunny, both sold separately. Unfortunately, it is not possible to request which doll you would prefer. BABY born branded doll The small “beginner’s version” (18 cm) features a super-soft doll body.
